summary: UX Overhaul Testing - All features verified working. New Home tab with 6 action tiles, 4-tab structure (Home, Contacts, Inbox, Menu), Menu reorganization with categorized sections, and contact address fields all implemented correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: home.tsx properly implements 6 action tiles (Share My Card, Review Link, Create Card, My Showroom, Quick Dial, Add Contact)
_layout.tsx correctly restructured to 4 visible tabs with href: null for hidden dialer and team tabs
more.tsx reorganized into clean categorized sections with collapsible headers
contact/[id].tsx has address fields (Street, City, State, ZIP, Country) properly wired to state and displayed
models.py Contact and ContactCreate models include address_street, address_city, address_state, address_zip, address_country fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: UX overhaul complete. Home tab is the new daily command center. Tab bar shows 4 tabs (Home, Contacts, Inbox, Menu). Dialer and Team are accessible via Menu > Tools. Contact forms have address fields in edit mode. Active tab color is gold (#C9A962).

verified: Share My Card tile - navigates to /card/{user_id}
Review Link tile - copies review URL with store slug
Create Card tile - navigates to congrats template
My Showroom tile - navigates to /showcase/{user_id}
Quick Dial tile - opens modal with contact search and call functionality
Add Contact tile - navigates to /contact/new
Home tab visible with home icon
Contacts tab visible with people icon
Inbox tab visible with chatbubbles icon
Menu tab visible with grid icon
Dialer tab hidden (href: null in _layout.tsx)
Team tab hidden (href: null in _layout.tsx)
Modal opens when Quick Dial tile clicked
Search input for filtering contacts
Contact list with call icons
Close button (X) works
Recent Activity header displayed on Home tab
View All link navigates to activity feed
Activity items display with icons and timestamps
